vision_summary.statement: بناء منظومة ديجيتال إسلامية عالمية تحقق العدل الاقتصادي والابتكار التقني بأمانة وشفافية

pillars.name: Al-Amanah (التأمين)
pillars.description: كل معاملة تقوم على الأمانة والصدق - No deception, no fraud, complete integrity in all transactions

pillars.name: Al-Adl (العدل)
pillars.description: العدل حتى لو بيننا وبين أنفسنا - Fair distribution, transparent algorithms, equitable partnership models

pillars.name: Al-Itqan (الإتقان)
pillars.description: إن الله يحب إذا عمل أحدكم عملاً أن يتقنه - Built-in quality, AI-powered optimization, continuous improvement

pillars.name: At-Taraddi (التراضي)
pillars.description: البيع عن تراضٍ منكما - All partnerships must be voluntary, consensual, with full information

pillars.name: Al-Kahf (الكهف)
pillars.description: حماية الملكية الفكرية والبيانات الخاصة - Protect data, IP, privacy as fundamental rights

strategic_goals.yardstick: Partnerships across: Tech (Google, Microsoft, Apple), Finance (Banks, Fintechs), Commerce (E-commerce, Logistics), Government (Saudi, GCC regulators)
strategic_goals.kpi: Partner satisfaction ≥ 90%, contract closure rate ≥ 85%, integration success ≥ 95%

strategic_goals.yardstick: Sheikha Search, SheikhaTube, SheikhaMail, SheikhaDrive, Maps, Workspace, Ads, Analytics, AI Studio
strategic_goals.kpi: 9 products live, 100M+ users engaged, revenue target $500M+ by 2030

strategic_goals.yardstick: Federated infrastructure across Google, Microsoft, NVIDIA, AWS with fallback mechanisms
Halal-certified algorithms, Sharia-compliant contracts, Zakat automation, Riba-free models
strategic_goals.kpi: Fatwa council approval, OIC recognition, AAOIFI compliance

strategic_goals.yardstick: 25 AI bots managing 25 departments with 113 human employees in support roles
strategic_goals.kpi: Bot autonomy ≥ 90%, decision transparency 100%, human oversight always available

position_as_orchestrator.position_description: Central hub connecting technology partners, financial institutions, regulators, and users
position_as_orchestrator.requirement: Neutral, trustworthy, culturally aligned with all partners

position_as_innovator.position_description: Drive adoption of Sharia-compliant models, Islamic finance digitization, autonomous AI governance
position_as_innovator.requirement: Technical excellence, religious scholarship, regulatory expertise

position_as_market_leader.position_description: Become the trusted alternative to secular big tech for Muslim-majority markets and businesses
position_as_market_leader.requirement: Superior UX, ethical AI, transparent policies, religious legitimacy

next_steps: 1. Identify & recruit Tier 1 Strategic Partners (8 targets)
2. Conduct due diligence & financial assessment (30 days)
3. Negotiate & sign partnership agreements with legal review
